message:
🌱 Add litellm: [Bug]: Claude Code not working with Vercel models due to mission (#1189)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "litellm-20743-bug-claude-code-not-working-with-vercel-models-due-to-thinking-err",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "litellm: [Bug]: Claude Code not working with Vercel models due to \"thinking\" error",
+    "description": "[Bug]: Claude Code not working with Vercel models due to \"thinking\" error. This issue affects 30+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify litellm troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your litellm deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review litellm configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm\n```\n### Check for existing issues\n\n### What happened?\n\nI am using Anthropic Sonnet 4.5 through Vercel AI. I have this bug with Claude Code when thinking is enabled."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Bug]: Claude Code not working with Vercel models due to…",
+        "description": "## Relevant issues\nhttps://vercel.com/ai-gateway/models/claude-sonnet-4.5\r\n## Pre-Submission checklist\n\n- [see details](https://docs.litellm.ai/docs/extras/contributing_code)\r\r\n\n## CI (LiteLLM team)\n\n>\n\n>\n> - 50-55 passing tests: main is stable with minor issues.\n> - 45-49 passing tests: acceptable\n```yaml\n`500 {\"error\":{\"message\":\"Error calling litellm.acompletion for non-Anthropic model: litellm.UnsupportedParamsError: vercel_ai_gateway does not support       \n     parameters: ['thinking'], for model=anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5. To drop these, \n     set 'litellm.drop_params=True' or for proxy:\\n\\n'litellm_settings:\\n drop_params\n      true'\\n. \\n If you want to use these params dynamically send                   \n     allowed_openai_params=['thinking'] in your                                      \n     request.\",\"type\":\"None\",\"param\":\"None\",\"code\":\"500\"}'`\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [Bug]: Claude Code not working with Vercel models… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Relevant issues\nhttps://vercel.com/ai-gateway/models/claude-sonnet-4.5\r\n## Pre-Submission checklist\n\n- [see details](https://docs.litellm.ai/docs/extras/contributing_code)\r\r\n\n## CI (LiteLLM team)\n\n>\n\n>\n> - 50-55 passing tests: main is stable with minor issues.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "`500 {\"error\":{\"message\":\"Error calling litellm.acompletion for non-Anthropic model: litellm.UnsupportedParamsError: vercel_ai_gateway does not support       \n     parameters: ['thinking'], for model=anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5. To drop these, \n     set 'litellm.drop_params=True' or for proxy:\\n\\n'litellm_settings:\\n drop_params\n      true'\\n. \\n If you want to use these params dynamically send                   \n     allowed_openai_params=['thinking'] in your                                      \n     request.\",\"type\":\"None\",\"param\":\"None\",\"code\":\"500\"}'`"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "litellm",
+      "community",

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "troubleshoot"

+      "pr": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/20745"
+    },
